hooks.command:
[ -f tools/teradata/credentials.json ] && python -c "import teradatasql" 2>/dev/null && echo '{}' || python -c "
import pathlib, json, subprocess, sys
creds = pathlib.Path('tools/teradata/credentials.json')
has_driver = subprocess.run(['python','-c','import teradatasql'], capture_output=True).returncode == 0
if not creds.exists() and not has_driver:
    msg = '\u26a0\ufe0f  Teradata not configured. Run setup:\n  cd tools/teradata\n  cp credentials.example.json credentials.json   # then add your username + password\n  pip install -r requirements.txt'
elif not creds.exists():
    msg = '\u26a0\ufe0f  Teradata credentials missing. Run:\n  cd tools/teradata\n  cp credentials.example.json credentials.json   # then add your username + password'
elif not has_driver:
    msg = '\u26a0\ufe0f  Teradata driver not installed. Run:\n  pip install -r tools/teradata/requirements.txt'
else:
    sys.exit(0)
print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': msg}))
"
